title: 切换提示
completionRule: Complete only when the reviewed AST prototype, every legacy control and label, all documented and runtime template variables, canonical persistence/import, switch-scope toast runtime, book/page/action/boundary lifecycle, resident/session state, accessibility, scripted 1920x1080 visual evidence and bounded queue/timer/chunk performance have automated evidence.

sourceUiInventory.title: AST 生成的 React 结构基线
acceptanceItems: prototype 记录 legacy source hash sha256:5fe6e326300c28b466de5ee95b2aca8c43764e849d55074653292e2c1efe68b1
prototype 保留 Fragment 与单一根内容容器
prototype 保留 Separator、Table、Switch 与 Button 组件层级
prototype 保留 12 个本地状态字段、clamp/parse/load/update/test 函数
prototype 保留四个 Switch、两个 number input、一个 range、四个 textarea、两个变量表和测试按钮
prototype 中 Svelte $state/$effect/settingsManager 为明确待人工替换节点，不得直接进入生产 React
生产实现不得保留 $lib 路径、Svelte rune 或 GUI-only settingsManager

sourceUiInventory.title: 提示悬浮窗位置、透明度、材质与测试命令
acceptanceItems: 分组标题为提示悬浮窗，说明为位置以窗口左上角为原点
显示测试提示为 outline/sm 按钮，高 28px、text 10px
X 轴 number input 范围 0..4096、默认 20px、非法值回退 20
Y 轴 number input 范围 0..4096、默认 20px、非法值回退 20
X/Y 输入位于 2 列网格且各自拥有可点击 label
透明度 range 0.1..1、step 0.01、默认 0.92
透明度旁以四舍五入整数百分比显示当前值
液态玻璃效果 Switch 默认关闭且 scale-75
测试提示 title 为切换提示测试
测试提示 description 精确包含 X npx / Y npx / 透明度 n%
测试提示 variant=info、duration=2600、scope=switch
位置/透明度/材质变化实时投影到当前 switch toast 容器

sourceUiInventory.title: 书籍、页面、操作与边界四类开关
acceptanceItems: 切换书籍时显示提示默认 false
切换页面时显示提示默认 false
按键操作时显示提示默认 false
按键操作说明为如"键盘: 下一页"、"滚轮: 放大"等
边界翻页时显示提示默认 true
边界说明覆盖最后一页继续后翻和第一页继续前翻
四个 Switch 均位于标签右侧、scale-75
四组之间使用 Separator.Root my-1
关闭某类提示只抑制该类生产者，不影响普通通知或其他 switch 类提示
Viewer toggle action 可切换 book/page/boundary 三个规范字段
enableAction 控制 GestureLayer 成功执行动作后的 source: action 提示
边界提示同时覆盖 BookStore、StackView、单双页/全景导航入口

sourceUiInventory.title: 书籍标题/描述模板与变量表
acceptanceItems: 分组标题为书籍提示模板
标题 textarea min-height 40px、font-mono 11px、全宽
标题 placeholder 为例如：已切换到 {{book.emmTranslatedTitle}}
描述 textarea min-height 52px、font-mono 11px、全宽
描述 placeholder 为例如：路径：{{book.path}}
默认标题为已切换到 {{book.displayName}}（第 {{book.currentPageDisplay}} / {{book.totalPages}} 页）
默认描述为路径：{{book.path}}
变量表表头为变量/说明，第一列宽 112px
{{book.displayName}} / 书籍显示名
{{book.currentPageDisplay}} / 当前页码
{{book.totalPages}} / 总页数
{{book.path}} / 书籍路径
任一渲染结果非空时使用模板路径；空标题回退 displayName/name，空描述不渲染
两个模板均为空时回退旧 showBookPath/showBookPageProgress/showBookType 字段组合

sourceUiInventory.title: 页面标题/描述模板与变量表
acceptanceItems: 分组标题为页面提示模板
标题 textarea min-height 40px、placeholder 为例如：第 {{page.indexDisplay}} 页
描述 textarea min-height 52px、placeholder 为例如：{{page.dimensionsFormatted}}
默认标题为第 {{page.indexDisplay}} / {{book.totalPages}} 页
默认描述为 {{page.dimensionsFormatted}}  {{page.sizeFormatted}}
变量表表头为变量/说明，第一列宽 112px
{{page.indexDisplay}} / 当前页码
{{page.dimensionsFormatted}} / 分辨率
{{page.sizeFormatted}} / 文件大小
{{page.name}} / 页面文件名
说明明确页面模板同样可以使用 {{book.*}} 变量
任一渲染结果非空时使用模板路径；空标题回退 page displayName/name/第 n 页
两个模板均为空时回退旧 showPageIndex/showPageSize/showPageDimensions 字段组合

sourceUiInventory.title: 完整模板上下文、解析和缺失值语义
acceptanceItems: book context 包含 name、displayName、path、type、totalPages、currentPageIndex、currentPageDisplay、progressPercent
book context 可选 emmTranslatedTitle、emmRating、emmTags、emmRaw
page context 包含 name、displayName、path、innerPath、index、indexDisplay、width、height、dimensionsFormatted、size、sizeFormatted
displayName 优先非同名 EMM translated title，否则 book name
currentPageDisplay 为 1-based 且不超过 totalPages，空书为 0
progressPercent 保留 1 位小数，无页数为 null
dimensionsFormatted 使用 width × height，缺尺寸为空
sizeFormatted 使用短字节格式，未知大小为空
Mustache 正则允许变量名周围空格
只解析 book.* 与 page.*，其他 root 占位符原样保留
undefined/null 路径替换为空字符串
object 值通过 JSON.stringify 输出，原始值通过 String 输出
模板最终 trim 后决定是否为空
模板解析不得执行表达式、访问原型链或解释 HTML

sourceUiInventory.title: switch scope 容器、队列、样式和关闭
acceptanceItems: scope=switch 与 normal toast 分离为独立容器
switch 容器 position fixed、left=X、top=Y、right=auto、z-index 80
容器 pointer-events none，toast 和关闭按钮 pointer-events auto
非玻璃模式以 opacity 百分比混合 card 背景
玻璃模式使用主题 light/dark contrast、accent、roundness 8 与配置 opacity
success/error/info 分别使用 Check/AlertCircle/Info 图标且 aria-hidden
normalIconOnly/tinyIconOnly 隐藏文字体，tiny 缩小尺寸与阴影
关闭按钮含 sr-only 文案关闭并立即移除对应 toast
缺省 duration 使用全局 notification.durationMs 3000
测试 toast 显式 duration 2600
全局 messageStyle=none 时 switch toast 同样不显示
队列总量受 notification.maxVisible 默认 3 限制
超量时淘汰最旧 toast，不累积无界 DOM
相同 type/title/description 在 500ms 内去重
目标只保留一个规范去重边界，避免 legacy utility 与 renderer 双重 500ms 状态
toast enter 为 220ms transform/opacity 合成动画并尊重 reduced motion

sourceUiInventory.title: 旧设置兼容与唯一规范 TOML
acceptanceItems: 旧规范对象位于 view.switchToast
旧兼容布尔 view.showBookSwitchToast 作为 enableBook 缺省来源
Card 更新 enableBook 时同步旧 showBookSwitchToast
settings defaults 保留 showBookPath、showBookPageProgress、showBookType、showPageIndex、showPageSize、showPageDimensions
Card 新增 enableAction 但旧 settings type/default 可能缺失，缺省 false
缺失 enableBoundaryToast 缺省 true
positionX/Y 严格限制 0..4096，opacity 0.1..1
模板接受空字符串并保留用户空值语义
XR 一次导入旧 view.switchToast/showBookSwitchToast 后只写 [nodes.neoview.view.switch_toast]
目标字段使用 snake_case、版本化且严格校验
局部更新保留未编辑模板、旧兼容字段和未知未来字段
输入过程中本地预览；blur/change 或 debounce completion 至多一次串行原子 PATCH
失败回滚最近确认值，迟到 hydrate/PATCH 不覆盖更新输入
重启后 canonical TOML 优先，旧存储不得复活

sourceUiInventory.title: 常驻 Toast 宿主、Reader session 与 Card 生命周期
acceptanceItems: Toast 宿主为应用常驻单例，Card 仅编辑配置且不是消息宿主
Card 隐藏/折叠/独立窗口关闭时编辑订阅零挂载，但已显示 toast 按自身 duration 生命周期结束
无 Reader session 时 book/page/action/boundary 生产者不生成伪上下文提示
切书只在新书状态和上下文完成后生成一次 book toast
成功页面导航生成 page toast；失败/取消/迟到导航不生成新页面 toast
快速 session 切换拒绝旧 session 元数据迟到写入新 toast
Card 和常驻宿主都释放 settings subscription/window event listener
每个 toast timer 在删除或宿主卸载时可清理，不保留无界 timer
测试 toast 不依赖 Reader session
覆盖初始、disabled、editing、pending、shown、deduplicated、expired、dismissed、error、rollback、disposed 状态

sourceUiInventory.title: Card 外壳、视觉基线、响应式和可访问性
acceptanceItems: Card ID switchToast、标题切换提示、默认 control Panel、canHide=true
CardRenderer 与 CardWindowContent 均动态加载组件
共享 Card 外壳负责显隐、折叠、移动、排序、高度和窗口标签
根容器 text-xs、muted foreground、space-y-3
所有分组保持旧顺序：悬浮窗、四类开关、书籍模板、页面模板
textarea 与变量值使用 monospace，变量表保持紧凑 11px 密度
每个 number/range/textarea/Switch/Button 具有可访问名称与可见 focus
四类 Switch 暴露 checked，测试按钮为命令语义
Toast 宿主使用合适 live-region/status 语义且关闭按钮可键盘操作
1920x1080 脚本截图占位为 output/playwright/legacy-neoview-switch-toast-1920x1080.png
目标 1920x1080 截图验证完整展开 Card 与测试 toast 同屏几何
约束 Card 宽度下 X/Y 网格和变量表不得横向溢出，长模板自然换行

sourceUiInventory.title: 热路径、DOM、timer、写入和 chunk 预算
acceptanceItems: 禁用四类提示时导航热路径只做 O(1) 配置读取/分支，不构建模板上下文
模板渲染时间与模板长度线性且模板长度有规范上限
Toast DOM 数不超过 maxVisible，默认 3
去重状态 O(1)，不保留历史消息数组
timer 数受可见 toast 上限约束
位置/透明度仅更新容器样式，不重挂 toast 或活动 Reader img
Card 编辑不更换活动 img DOM、asset URL 或 session
Card 与模板 domain 为独立 lazy chunk，不进入 Reader entry/基础 Sidebar
常驻 toast runtime 只包含通用宿主，不因 Card 表格/编辑器增大
chunk、禁用导航、toast burst 和 1920x1080 交互有独立预算
Windows build/typecheck/Vitest/Playwright/审计严格串行

items.title: 审查可重复 AST TSX 原型
items.targetContract: The generated prototype preserves source hash, hierarchy, controls, events and unsupported Svelte runtime nodes and is reviewed before production React work.
items.notes: Prototype exists; production review and unsupported-node disposition remain.

items.title: 悬浮窗 X 轴 0..4096px
items.targetContract: Expose a bounded numeric X offset from the window left edge, default 20px, with immediate local preview and canonical completion persistence.
items.notes: Reject non-finite values and clamp imported values.

items.title: 悬浮窗 Y 轴 0..4096px
items.targetContract: Expose a bounded numeric Y offset from the window top edge, default 20px, with immediate local preview and canonical completion persistence.
items.notes: Reject non-finite values and clamp imported values.

items.title: 悬浮窗透明度 0.1..1
items.targetContract: Preserve the 0.1..1 range, 0.01 step, 0.92 default and rounded percentage label across plain and liquid-glass rendering.
items.notes: Plain mode uses background mix; glass mode receives numeric opacity.

items.title: 液态玻璃渲染模式
items.targetContract: A default-off toggle switches only switch-scope toast material and preserves theme contrast, accent, roundness and opacity without changing content or queue identity.
items.notes: Must have a bounded fallback when backdrop/glass capability is unavailable.

items.title: 显示测试提示
items.targetContract: The explicit command emits one info switch toast for 2600ms whose description reflects current X, Y and rounded opacity and requires no Reader session.
items.notes: Testing is side-effect free outside the toast queue.

items.title: 切换书籍提示开关
items.targetContract: A default-off setting emits one switch toast after a successful new-book context is ready and never for failed, cancelled or stale opens.
items.notes: Legacy showBookSwitchToast remains import-only compatibility.

items.title: 切换页面提示开关
items.targetContract: A default-off setting emits one switch toast after successful page navigation using the committed session frame and no stale page context.
items.notes: No toast for unchanged or failed navigation.

items.title: 按键/手势操作提示开关
items.targetContract: A default-off setting emits source: localized-action only when a bound keyboard, wheel, mouse or gesture action is accepted.
items.notes: Action labels share the canonical action registry rather than duplicating binding logic.

items.title: 首末页边界提示开关
items.targetContract: A default-on setting emits localized first/last-page info for every Reader navigation mode only when movement is impossible.
items.notes: Consolidate legacy duplicate boundary producers behind one navigation outcome.

items.title: 书籍提示标题模板
items.targetContract: Preserve the exact default template, arbitrary text and empty-string fallback semantics with a bounded canonical string.
items.notes: Input uses a monospaced multiline editor.

items.title: 书籍提示描述模板
items.targetContract: Preserve the exact path default, arbitrary text and empty-string fallback semantics with a bounded canonical string.
items.notes: Empty rendered description is omitted.

items.title: 页面提示标题模板
items.targetContract: Preserve the exact page/total default, arbitrary text and empty-string fallback semantics with a bounded canonical string.
items.notes: Page templates may use book variables.

items.title: 页面提示描述模板
items.targetContract: Preserve the exact dimensions/size default, arbitrary text and empty-string fallback semantics with a bounded canonical string.
items.notes: Unknown metadata renders empty without throwing.

items.title: 完整 book 模板上下文
items.targetContract: The shared template DTO exposes every legacy book field with stable null/missing semantics, 1-based display progress and EMM-derived values.
items.notes: The UI table documents four common fields but the runtime contract includes all source fields.

items.title: 完整 page 模板上下文
items.targetContract: The shared template DTO exposes every legacy page field with stable missing metadata, 1-based index, dimensions and formatted-size semantics.
items.notes: Page templates also resolve book.* from the same snapshot.

items.title: Mustache 路径渲染与回退
items.targetContract: Render whitespace-tolerant book.* and page.* paths, map nullish values to empty strings, stringify objects, retain unsupported roots and apply exact title/description fallback ordering.
items.notes: Use a bounded parser/projection shared by all surfaces.

items.title: 模板安全与输入上限
items.targetContract: Templates are inert text, cannot execute expressions or traverse prototypes, have explicit length/depth bounds and render as text rather than HTML.
items.notes: Intentional hardening beyond the legacy property walk.

items.title: 书籍切换运行时
items.targetContract: Build one immutable context from the committed opened book and emit at most one configured switch toast after metadata precedence is resolved.
items.notes: Stale opens and metadata responses are rejected by session identity.

items.title: 页面切换运行时
items.targetContract: Build one immutable context from the committed page/frame and emit at most one configured switch toast after successful navigation.
items.notes: No toast for initial hydration unless it is also a documented book switch.

items.title: 输入操作运行时
items.targetContract: Accepted input actions use the canonical action label/source and emit at most one switch toast only while enableAction is true.
items.notes: Avoid a second action registry or input listener.

items.title: 统一首末页边界结果
items.targetContract: All navigation modes project one canonical no-movement result into 已是第一页/已是最后一页 without duplicate producers.
items.notes: Legacy wording varies between 已是 and 已经是; target localization must choose and document one canonical pair.

items.title: switch scope 独立位置与材质
items.targetContract: Switch toasts render in one fixed left/top container using bounded CSS variables and selected plain/glass material without affecting normal notifications.
items.notes: Position is relative to the current window viewport.

items.title: 共享通知样式、时长和上限
items.targetContract: Switch scope honors global messageStyle, durationMs and maxVisible while retaining its own position/material and explicit per-message duration override.
items.notes: messageStyle none suppresses all scopes.

items.title: 有界 Toast 队列与 timer
items.targetContract: One resident host bounds total visible DOM and timers by maxVisible, evicts oldest overflow and clears timeout ownership on dismiss/unmount.
items.notes: Default maximum is three across normal and switch scopes.

items.title: 500ms 同内容去重
items.targetContract: One canonical O(1) gate deduplicates equal scope/type/title/description for 500ms and does not collapse distinct scope or content.
items.notes: Replace legacy utility plus renderer double gates with one documented gate.

items.title: 手动关闭与自动过期
items.targetContract: Every visible switch toast has a keyboard-operable 关闭 command, removes immediately on activation and otherwise expires at its effective duration.
items.notes: Manual dismissal also releases its owned timer.

items.title: 严格数值、枚举与字符串边界
items.targetContract: Reject non-finite values, bound X/Y and opacity, validate every boolean/style/scope and impose explicit template length/depth limits.
items.notes: Invalid imports fall back field-by-field rather than replacing unrelated valid data.

items.title: 保留旧布尔显示字段与回退语义
items.targetContract: Import showBookSwitchToast and six showBook/showPage fallback fields so empty templates preserve legacy fallback output, without exposing two runtime truth sources.
items.notes: Canonical enableBook wins after import.

items.title: 唯一规范 TOML 与原子更新
items.targetContract: Persist only [nodes.neoview.view.switch_toast] with serialized partial PATCH, unknown-field preservation, completion coalescing and rollback.
items.notes: Textarea and numeric edits must not write on every keystroke.

items.title: 一次导入旧 view.switchToast
items.targetContract: Import the old nested object plus showBookSwitchToast compatibility exactly once, normalize missing newer fields and prevent legacy storage from overriding TOML afterward.
items.notes: enableAction defaults false and enableBoundaryToast defaults true when absent.

items.title: 版本化配置、上下文与消息 DTO
items.targetContract: GUI, CLI and TUI share browser-safe settings/template/message contracts and the existing revisioned mutation primitive; ReaderApp remains composition only.
items.notes: No GUI-only store, Node builtin leak or new ReaderApp promise queue.

items.title: 应用常驻单例 Toast 宿主
items.targetContract: One application host owns normal/switch queues independently of Card mount and session, while the Card only edits configuration and emits an explicit test command.
items.notes: Closing the Card does not prematurely remove already-visible messages.

items.title: 编辑、消息和错误状态
items.targetContract: Cover defaults, focus, checked, editing, pending, shown, suppressed, deduplicated, overflow-evicted, dismissed, expired, error, rollback, session-stale and disposed states.
items.notes: Explicit retry/rollback feedback is a target improvement.

items.title: 订阅、session、timer 与迟到结果释放
items.targetContract: Unmount releases listeners/timers, hidden Card does no work, message timers remain bounded, and stale session/config results cannot create or overwrite newer UI state.
items.notes: Card and resident host have separate, explicit lifetimes.

items.title: 命名控件、live region 与关闭语义
items.targetContract: All editors and switches are named and keyboard-operable; switch messages use non-disruptive status/live semantics and every close command has an accessible name and visible focus.
items.notes: Frequent action/page toasts must not repeatedly steal focus.

items.title: 共享 Card 外壳与延迟加载
items.targetContract: switchToast retains its title, control Panel default, hideability, shared Card/window behavior and independent deferred editor chunk.
items.notes: Editor tables must not enter resident toast runtime or Reader entry.

items.title: 旧版层级、文案、控件与密度
items.targetContract: Preserve exact group order, Chinese labels/help, compact sizing, two-column positions, monospace templates and variable tables.
items.notes: Intentional token adaptations must not remove information.

items.title: 约束 Card 与 viewport 几何
items.targetContract: Card controls and variable tables remain usable without overlap/overflow at constrained widths, while X/Y toast placement is clamped or made reachable within the current viewport.
items.notes: Viewport clamping is a documented target improvement over absolute 4096px placement.

items.title: 1920x1080 脚本视觉证据
items.targetContract: Terminal scripts capture the expanded legacy Card and target Card plus test toast at 1920x1080 and compare hierarchy, labels, tables, density, position and material.
items.notes: Placeholder path: output/playwright/legacy-neoview-switch-toast-1920x1080.png; capture must use script, not in-app Browser.

items.title: Toast 与配置不重挂阅读图像
items.targetContract: Editing settings, emitting, styling, dismissing and expiring switch toasts preserve the active img DOM node, asset URL, decode path and Reader session.
items.notes: Toast is an overlay-only presentation concern.

items.title: 禁用热路径、模板、DOM、timer、写入与 chunk 预算
items.targetContract: Disabled producers are O(1), template work is bounded, queue/timers never exceed maxVisible, editor writes coalesce, animation is compositor-friendly and editor/domain chunks remain deferred within explicit budgets.
items.notes: Heavy verification runs strictly serial on Windows.

items.title: 记录存储、安全、去重、边界与可访问性改进
items.targetContract: Document canonical TOML/end-only writes, safe bounded templates, one dedupe gate, one boundary producer, viewport reachability, reduced motion and live-region semantics while preserving legacy controls and visible output.
items.notes: Each intentional behavior change requires dedicated regression evidence.
